name: Favorite Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter, sugar, and corn syrup in a saucepan.
2. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until the sugar has dissolved.
3. Allow mixture to cool slightly.
4. Add eggs, vanilla extract, and salt to the saucepan; stir well.
5. Pour the filling into the unbaked pastry shell.
6. Sprinkle pecan halves evenly over the top of the filling.
7. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 to 55 minutes.
8. Serve warm or cold.
